summary:
The fix is complete. The bug was in `/app/src/codegen.rs` in the `generate_getter` function. For `Ref` field types, the body was returning a reference (`&self.{name}`) but the return type was missing the reference symbol, returning just the owned type (e.g., `Company`).

The fix was simple - change this:
```rust
format!(
    "    pub fn {}(&self) -> {} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
    name, type_name, name
)
```

to this:
```rust
format!(
    "    pub fn {}(&self) -> &{} {{\n        &self.{}\n    }}\n\n",
    name, type_name, name
)
```

Now the generated code correctly shows `pub fn address(&self) -> &Address` which matches the body returning `&self.address`.
